https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=assassin&Category=1&CreatorName=dubit&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

 

Introducing the Lethal Assassin Jacket – a garment that embodies stealth and style in one deadly package. Crafted for those who navigate the shadows, this jacket empowers you to strike fear into the hearts of your foes. Unleash your inner assassin and don this iconic attire.
